comments.author: @CorryCarden
comments.text:
The biggest problem we are facing today was caused by the Democrats who opened the borders, no vetting, no checking for diseases, no waiting in line, no legal application. This was done to gain power. Many of these immigrants will illegally vote as non citizens. There are communities giving IDs that are illegitimate. This is a dangerous threat to our Constitutional Republic. Now we have communists being elected. 
Trump is doing an outstanding job returning our country to its former greatness by returning to Hamiltonian economic principles of “Production” of self sufficiency, producing what we consume, not outsourcing which led to the closure of our Industries. We are investing in our country. We must also bring back law and order. Democrats want to eliminate the police, ICE, DOJ. There are criminals and mentally ill who entered through our open
Borders. There are 400,000 unaccompanied children who have disappeared that ICE has already recovered 140,000. 
The Democrats are want complete power and they want the destruction of our country.
The Globalists support NGOs that organize radical movements to cause disruption and culture revolution. This is taking place in England and Europe.
